messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

update.title: 🎉 New Version Available
update.description: New version v{{version}} is available. Would you like to install it now?
update.installNote: Click "Install Update" to restart the app and install the new version.

auth.loginDescription: Login to use cloud AI models
auth.loginPhoneDescription: Sign in with phone number and password
auth.registerDescription: Register with phone and password. New users get 450 free credits (about 3 dual-video generations).
auth.authErrorMessage: Error occurred while checking authorization status
auth.waitingForBrowser: Waiting for login completion in browser...
auth.pollErrorMessage: Failed to check login status, please try again
auth.loginRequestFailed: Login request failed, please try again
auth.rechargeDescription: Choose a package and pay with WeChat QR. Dual video costs about 150 credits.
auth.wechatScanHint: Scan the QR code with WeChat to pay
auth.wechatWaiting: Credits will be added automatically after payment…
auth.captchaLoadFailed: Failed to load captcha, please try again
auth.phoneInvalid: Phone must be a valid 11-digit number
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordNeedLower: Password must include a lowercase letter
auth.passwordNeedUpper: Password must include an uppercase letter
auth.passwordNeedSpecial: Password must include a special character

socket.maxRetriesReached: Connection failed, please restart the application
